---
title: "Convert Seurat to Matrix files for AnnData"
subtitle: "Uses all assays by default"
author: "Tyrone Chen, Hujun Yu"
date: '`r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`'
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
    highlight: textmate
    keep_md: TRUE
    number_sections: TRUE
    theme: flatly
    toc: TRUE
    toc_float: TRUE
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
params:
  config: "run_config.json"
---

<a href="https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg?style=for-the-badge" alt="MIT License">
</a>

<a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY%204.0-lightgrey.svg?style=for-the-badge" alt="CC BY 4.0">
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/hoganlab-fish/tumour_angiogenic_enhancer">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-hoganlab--fish%2Ftumour_angiogenic_enhancer-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub">
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/PMCC-BioinformaticsCore">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-PMCC--BioinformaticsCore%2F?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white" alt="GitHub">
</a>

<a href="https://biomedicalsciences.unimelb.edu.au/sbs-research-groups/anatomy-and-physiology-research/stem-cell-and-developmental-biology/hogan-laboratory-vascular-developmental-genetics-and-cell-biology">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-hoganlab-4285F4?style=for-the-badge&logo=google-chrome&logoColor=white" alt="Website">
</a>

<a href="https://www.petermac.org/research/research-technologies/bioinformatics">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-hoganlab-4285F4?style=for-the-badge&logo=google-chrome&logoColor=white" alt="Website">
</a>

Copyright © 2026 <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9207-0385">Tyrone Chen <img alt="ORCID logo" src="https://info.orcid.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/orcid_16x16.png" width="16" height="16" /></a>, <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3746-0695">Oliver Yu <img alt="ORCID logo" src="https://info.orcid.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/orcid_16x16.png" width="16" height="16" /></a>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo=TRUE,
    progress=TRUE,
    verbose=TRUE,
    message=FALSE, 
    warning=FALSE
    )
```

# Overview

We cannot convert the `Seurat` data object into an `anndata` object automatically. So we manually extract the data in each layer of the **RNA** assay.

## To generate this file

You will need the environment specified in `code/README.md`.

- `R` libraries: `Matrix qs2 Seurat Signac`
- `Python` libraries: `anndata numpy pandas scipy`

```{bash class.source="fold-show", label="cmd_arg", eval=FALSE}
Rscript -e "rmarkdown::render(
    'seurat_to_matrix.Rmd', 
    'html_document', 
    params=list(config='run_config.json')
)"
```

# Setup
## Load libraries

We load libraries associated with standard scRNA-Seq preprocessing. This allows us to read and export the relevant data.

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="libraries"}
libraries <<- c("jsonlite", "Matrix", "qs2", "Seurat", "Signac")

options(future.globals.maxSize = 8000 * 1024^2)

load_packages <- function(packages) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages({
        cat(paste("Loading", packages, sep=" "), sep="\n")
        invisible(sapply(
            packages, library, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE
            ))
    })
}
load_packages(libraries)
```

## Load configuration

Load configuration file. This gets updated and passed to python in the end:

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="load_config"}
cfg <- fromJSON(params$config)
```

## Load input and output file paths

Setup input/output file paths and directories:

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="setup_input"}
infile <- cfg$infile
outdir <- cfg$outdir

if (!dir.exists(outdir)) {
    dir.create(outdir, recursive=TRUE)
}

if (grepl("\\.qs2$", infile)) {
    data <- qs_read(infile)
} else {
    data <- readRDS(infile)
}
print(data)
```

## Detect data

Detect assays and metadata:

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="detect_config"}
# detect assays and write back to config
cfg$assays <- Assays(data)
cfg$scvi$detected <- any(
    grepl("scvi", names(data@reductions), ignore.case=TRUE)
)
write(toJSON(cfg, pretty=TRUE, auto_unbox=TRUE), params$config)
```

## Export data

Tries to detect gene activity data if present. Can be specified in configs manually.

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="export_data"}
# rest unchanged — outdir is now from cfg
write.csv(data@meta.data, file.path(outdir, "metadata.csv"))
writeLines(colnames(data), file.path(outdir, "barcodes.txt"))

for (assay in Assays(data)) {
    writeLines(
        rownames(data[[assay]]), 
        file.path(outdir, paste0(assay, "_features.txt"))
    )
    for (layer in Layers(data, assay=assay)) {
        layer_data <- LayerData(data, assay=assay, layer=layer)
        if (!inherits(layer_data, "sparseMatrix")) {
            layer_data <- as(layer_data, "CsparseMatrix")
        }
        writeMM(
            layer_data, file.path(
                outdir, paste0(assay, "_", layer, ".mtx")
            )
        )
    }
}

# detect gene activity candidates and add to config
rna_features <- rownames(data[["RNA"]])
gene_activity_candidates <- c()

for (assay in Assays(data)) {
    if (assay == "RNA") next
    for (layer in Layers(data, assay=assay)) {
        assay_features <- rownames(data[[assay]])
        if (length(assay_features) == length(rna_features) && 
            all(assay_features == rna_features)) {
            key <- paste0(assay, "_", layer)
            gene_activity_candidates <- c(gene_activity_candidates, key)
            cat(sprintf("  Gene activity candidate: %s\n", key))
        }
    }
}

if (is.null(cfg$gene_activity)) {
    cfg$gene_activity <- as.list(gene_activity_candidates)
}

write(toJSON(cfg, pretty=TRUE, auto_unbox=TRUE), params$config)

for (reduction in names(data@reductions)) {
    write.csv(
        Embeddings(data, reduction),
        file.path(outdir, paste0(reduction, ".csv"))
    )
}
```

## Maintain a record of exported files

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="outfile_paths"}
data.frame(sapply(list.files(outdir), tools::md5sum, USE.NAMES=FALSE))
```

## Session info and timestamp

```{r class.source="fold-hide", label="session_info"}
sessionInfo()
date()
```

## Original command line input

```{r, class.source="fold-hide", label="cmd_args", echo=FALSE, comment=""}
cat("Command used:\n")
str(commandArgs(trailingOnly = FALSE), sep = "\n")
```
